unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Paul left the party at 10.30 and Sarah arrived at 11 o'clock.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: ar(阿) + rive(河) -> 阿河终于到达了目的地。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: At first I thought I'd done the right thing, but I soon realised that I'd made a big mistake.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: real(真实的) + ise(动词后缀) -> 认识到真实的情况，即意识到。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The people sitting next to me on the plane were nervous.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: nerve(神经) + ous(形容词后缀) -> 神经绷紧的，即紧张的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: When we got home last night, we found that somebody had broken into the flat.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: f(飞) + lat(拉提) -> 飞去公寓里喝拿铁咖啡。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She'd arranged to do something else.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: ar(一再) + range(范围/排列) -> 一再排列好日程，就是安排。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I offered my friends something to eat, but they weren't hungry.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: of(那个人) + fer(看作for, 为了) -> 主动提供帮助是为了那个人。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I went to Laura's house this morning and rang her doorbell, but there was no answer.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: door(门) + bell(铃) -> 安装在门上的铃就是门铃。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Yesterday he got a phone call from her. He was surprised.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: sur(在...上面) + prise(价格/抓取) -> 价格突然暴涨，让人感到很惊奇。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Sorry I'm late. The car broke down on my way here.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: break(打破) + down(向下) -> 机器散架倒下了，即出故障坏掉。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: At first I thought I'd done the right thing, but I soon realised that I'd made a big mistake.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: mis(坏的) + take(做/拿) -> 拿错了，做错了，就是犯了错误。
